text: I feel mostly fine, just a little less energetic than usual.
label: common_cold/discharge

text: I know it's likely nothing but I haven't felt right and it's worrying me.
label: migraine/discharge

text: Fever on and off, drenched in sweat, can't get out of bed. This has gone on 3 day(s), and I'm deteriorating, I can feel it. My heart won't slow down.
label: influenza/mild

text: I can't breathe properly. Severe chest pain, coughing up greenish phlegm, high temperature. 8 day(s) and scared, and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried.
label: influenza/moderate

text: It hit me fast — fever, chills, splitting headache, muscle pain everywhere. Been in bed 3 day(s), and I'm getting worse, not better.
label: influenza/moderate

text: It hit me fast — fever, chills, splitting headache, muscle pain everywhere. Been in bed 3 day(s), and I'm getting worse, not better.
label: influenza/moderate

text: I have a chesty cough with a bit of phlegm and some tightness in my chest. 4 day(s) now. I can't catch my breath.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: It hit me fast — fever, chills, splitting headache, muscle pain everywhere. Been in bed 8 day(s), though I think I'm slowly getting better. My temperature is really elevated.
label: influenza/moderate
